description: Calculate and record periodic depreciation for fleet vehicles using configurable methods, track book value over time, and generate depreciation schedules per finance book.

actors.name: Finance Manager
actors.description: Configures depreciation parameters, approves schedules, and posts depreciation entries

actors.name: Fleet Manager
actors.description: Provides acquisition cost and useful life estimates

actors.name: System
actors.description: Calculates depreciation schedules and runs periodic posting jobs

values.name: draft
values.description: Depreciation parameters set; schedule not yet generated

values.name: active
values.description: Depreciation is running; periodic postings are being made

values.name: partially_depreciated
values.description: Some depreciation has been posted; book value > salvage value

values.name: fully_depreciated
values.description: Book value has reached the salvage value; no further postings

values.name: disposed
values.description: Vehicle has been sold or scrapped; final disposal entries posted

transitions.description: Schedule generated and approved; depreciation begins
Book value has reached salvage value
Vehicle disposed of before full depreciation
Vehicle disposed of while partially depreciated

salvage_less_than_cost.description: Salvage value must be less than acquisition cost

useful_life_positive.description: Useful life in years must be a positive number greater than zero

start_date_after_acquisition.description: Depreciation start date must not precede the acquisition date

book_value_floor.description: Book value cannot fall below salvage value — depreciation stops when book value equals salvage value

straight_line_formula.description: Straight Line: periodic amount = (acquisition_cost - salvage_value) / total_periods

wdv_formula.description: Written Down Value: periodic amount = current_book_value × (rate_of_depreciation / periods_per_year)

ddb_formula.description: Double Declining Balance: rate = 2 / useful_life_years; amount = current_book_value × rate; floor at salvage value

manual_method.description: Manual method: amounts are entered directly per period by the finance manager

capitalised_repair_recalculation.description: When a repair capitalises additional cost, the depreciation base increases and the schedule is recalculated

disposal_reversal.description: Depreciation postings for periods beyond the disposal date are reversed on disposal

opening_depreciation_reduction.description: Opening accumulated depreciation reduces the net depreciable amount

given: acquisition_cost, salvage_value, useful_life_years, and depreciation_method are provided

given.description: Salvage value is less than acquisition cost

schedule_generated.result: A full depreciation schedule is generated showing the amount and date for each posting period

given: current period posting date has been reached

then.description: Reduce by period_amount; floor at salvage_value

depreciation_posted.result: Periodic depreciation amount is posted and book value is updated

given: current_book_value equals or is less than salvage_value after the latest posting
fully_depreciated.result: Vehicle is flagged as fully depreciated; no further periodic postings are made

given: vehicle is being disposed of (sold or scrapped)
disposal date and method are provided
disposal_entries_posted.result: Final disposal accounting entries are posted; gain or loss on disposal is computed

given: a capitalised repair has increased the vehicle's asset base
repair increases useful life (months extension provided)
schedule_recalculated_after_repair.result: Depreciation schedule is recalculated from the current book value over the revised remaining life

given.description: Salvage value is equal to or greater than acquisition cost

invalid_salvage_value.result: Schedule generation is rejected; user must provide a salvage value less than acquisition cost

errors.message: Salvage value must be less than the acquisition cost.
Depreciation start date cannot be before the vehicle's acquisition date.

events.name: depreciation.schedule_generated
events.description: A full depreciation schedule has been computed for a vehicle

events.name: depreciation.period_posted
events.description: A periodic depreciation amount has been posted for a vehicle

events.name: depreciation.fully_depreciated
events.description: A vehicle's book value has reached its salvage value

events.name: depreciation.disposal_posted
events.description: Final accounting entries for vehicle disposal have been posted

events.name: depreciation.schedule_recalculated
events.description: The depreciation schedule was revised following a capitalised repair or useful-life extension

related.reason: Acquisition cost and date from the vehicle master seed the depreciation calculation
Disposal workflow triggers the final depreciation entries and gain/loss calculation
Periodic depreciation amounts can be posted as expense records for management reporting
Capitalised repairs from the maintenance log can increase the depreciable base and trigger schedule recalculation
